uplink.description: Electricity meter consumption (kWh counter + W power)
uplink._note: Upstream Energy_Counter 36754.42 kWh -> metering.energy.total 36754420 Wh; Power 7000.78 W -> power.active. Supply_Voltage 3038 mV -> battery 3.038 V.

uplink.description: Electricity meter delivery/export (kW power, negative signum)
uplink._note: Energy_Counter 1234.52 kWh -> 1234520 Wh; Power 4000 kW -> 4000000 W, negated to -4000000 W for Delivery/Negative signum.

uplink.description: Gas/heat meter block (m^3) has no electrical-vocabulary home -> extras only
uplink._note: Energy_Counter_Unit m^3 / Power_Unit m^3/h are gas/heat volume + flow, not electrical energy/power; preserved as camelCase extras volumeM3 (10.024) and flowRateM3h (1.5).

uplink.description: Header-only frame (no application data) emits device telemetry only
uplink._note: Header length 3 with no TLV payload: only TX reason and supply rail (3038 mV -> 3.038 V battery) are present.
Upstream rejects any port other than 10 with 'Wrong Port Number'.

uplink.description: Unknown application datatype byte is rejected
uplink._note: Datatype 0x99 is not 0x01/0x02; upstream clears decoded and sets parser_error 'Data Type Failure'.
